title: Never lasting hope on you
description: A story about love and loss.

parts.modified: In this busy life, as I sat having lunch alone, my phone beeped—her name flashed on the screen.I paused, took a sip of water to steady myself, then drew a deep breath, trying to stay composed.As I reached for the phone, I noticed my hand trembling.Without a second thought, I answered.A moment of silence followed, then… I heard her heavy breathing from the other side.”
parts.original: In this busy life, while having lunch alone.my phone beeped with her name.i drank water to come back to my senses, then took a long breath and made myself comfortable.while lifting the phone l could see my hand shanking, without any movement I answered the call.i could feel heavy breathing from other side...

parts.modified:
To break the silence, I said, ‘Hello.’ To my surprise, she responded, ‘Hi, how are you?’ A flood of thoughts rushed through my mind—How can I be fine without you? How could a man stay happy without his heart? But instead, I simply said, ‘Good.’

                        She paused for a moment and then said, ‘Can we meet tonight at Dhara’s Dhaba? I need to talk to you about something important.’

                        I hesitated for a second, my mind racing, but all I managed to say was, ‘Okay…’

title: Unexpected Love Story
description: A drama about lost connections and rainy days.

parts.original: She sat by the window, watching the rain fall. It had been raining for days.
parts.modified: She remained by the window, mesmerized by the relentless rainfall that had persisted for days.

parts.original: As I talk to mom, my phone starts vibrating. It is from unknown number. I thought it may be from one my friend or Zoya friend. I just lifted the call and a person from other side said why have lifted his call, people came to know your location. It was a confirmation weather the news he was right or not. Please don't lift the call from him. Immediately he disconnected the call before I could speak anything or ask him who is it. Mom asks me what happened, who is it as she sees a worry expression in my face. I said nothing wrong number...

I just left it, as my bro who comes by saying big gudllagooba(owl) came to our house. I call him with that name and in return, he calls me as this. I just refreshed and started eating tiffin which mom made. mom's food is the best food in the world. Again my phone rings, this time it is from zoya she says your friend Ramesh called me and told you to call him immediately. Then I realized, I told him that I will meet him this time. She then asked me have you reached , ya I reached what about you. Ya I reached, did I receive any calls from Ajith or Sameer. I was like what should I answer her, if I say yes she will get tensed.

I just said no to make her happy for a few days. She said how are your parents are they fine ?. Yes, they are fine and happy to see their son after 8 months.are you serious after 8 months you are going home ??. Yes, I didn't get time. OMG how could you stay I know you were busy with your Keerti. Ya very busy, every day taking her to date is not that easy task. You are a crazy person, I just told for fun that you are busy with her and you started feeling it and narrating a story on it. I am a writer It's our job. I think God has done a good thing by exchanging our phones. Why what happened. Nothing rey after many days I am happy and it is because of you. Thanks for giving me that honor.

Even I never thought you will treat me as a friend this soon. Hehehe ok bye let's talk later. Never say bye say see you again. Copying style of Ravinder Singh. Ya, I liked it so follow it. Ok, see you again. I quickly got ready and went to meet Ramesh my college mate. Meeting him after 1 year. I go to his house we stand outside of his house and talk. Zoya calls me again. This time she says I thought you are a good friend but never expected you are a follower and cheater.

What happened to you, why are you saying like that. ya you don't know anything, you are a very innocent person. See tell me first what happened then do what you want. Then why were you following me from these many days? See I don't even know how you look or know your name. Then why are my pictures in your phone? Was there my watermark on the pic. Yes, I could see shot on one plus by manikanta. Please don't mind once forward me those pics I will verify and tell you. Can I believe you? Yes, you be on the call I will check them and answer you. She sent those pics in what's app. Ramesh becomes worried as he watches tension in my expressions.

I immediately opened her what's app downloaded the images. I started laughing loudly. She gets pissed off and says what is there to laugh at this. I just told her I myself never observed that while capturing a thing in mall adds you in that image. I really didn't mean to capture your images, I was just capturing some random images but you were in the same place. I didn't even open your gallery to know how you look. I didn't understand how our life became a coincidence. Even I am having same doubt, anything can happen in life.

In this busy world why only our phones got exchanged and why I am there in maximum pics you captured. Why we both accidentally go to the same place. I just said her anything can happen in life, we need to wait and see for the reason. she said ya this is true ok sorry for miss understanding you. when did I become unknown to you.what are you saying I didn't understand she says. I think there will be no sorry in between friends, only unknowns say sorry. She laughed and said ok I will take back my word. I asked her weather she ate her lunch or not. In meanwhile Ramesh became impatient so he said dude you can chat with your girl after going home, but right now spend time with this best friend also na. She heard it and immediately disconnected the call,

I immediately gave a serious look at him, he understood it and took his phone starring his what's app. Now tell everything is done na, anyway she is not my girlfriend. Then who is she, the way you were talking I thought like that. I clearly explained him whole story. He was like which movie you are narrating to me. You believe or don't this is what happened till now. Later we both chitchatted for some time. My phone started vibrating, it is from unknown. I know this must be from Ajith or Sameer. I told him just listen to the call silently and you will understand everything and believe everything.

Ajith from another side started saying, baby, where are you come back I am missing you. I disconnected the call and blocked this new number. Ramesh gives a worried look and says what are you going to do. I said at present nothing I will just ignore him and later need to find a solution for it. After some time I left his house and attended my cousin marriage. All my family members were eagerly waiting for my presence as they had not seen me for the past 8 months. The common question what relatives ask is what are you doing. By luck I am having an answer to this question as I am doing the job otherwise it will be like relatives harassment. Till 10th which school you are studying, what is your aggregate,after 10th which college and which university? After that which campus you got. Even CID people don't do this type of interrogation. To get relief from all these things I was searching for a corner seat. I went there and to my surprise, there was a paper on it. I thought it was a waste paper but something was written on it.

The message was Miss you from Sonali. That paper slipped from my hand and fell down as I was in shock. I hold the chair beside me to stay conscious. it took me 5 minutes to come back to my senses. My brother comes near me and says what happened, and watches the paper near my legs and tries to lift it. I grabbed the paper immediately and kept it in my pocket. I just said to him let's go for lunch to divert his attention. We went downstairs and started eating lunch. My mom asks me how come you are eating rice as you don't eat rice when you come to functions.

I didn't even notice what I was eating, as I don't prefer eating rice when there are special items. I just said simply just got bored by the specials. I ate quickly and sat at a corner and started thinking why Sonali came here or is it that devil. I had warned that devil seriously that day itself so I think it won't come again.after some time Ajith calls me and says hi Mani don't underestimate me. I know Zoya phone is with you, I just wanted to know what you will do. I know everything about you, I even know Sonali and Pallavi, Keerti. I was in shock how come he knows everything.

title: Cyber City 2099
description: High-stakes action in a neon-soaked future.

parts.original: Neon lights reflected off the wet pavement as Kael adjusted his cybernetic arm. The city never slept.
parts.modified: Neon reflections danced on the slick pavement. Kael calibrated his cybernetic arm; insomnia was this city's only constant.

parts.original: He was looking for the data chip. It was worth more than his life.
A shadow moved in the alley. He drew his blaster.
parts.modified: Movement in the alleyway. Kael's hand found his blaster before he even registered the threat.
